mapper.select: SELECT id, interface_id, datasource_id, query, operation_type, result_type, param_mapping, rollback_on_error, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_db_adapter_config WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eai_db_adapter_config (interface_id, datasource_id, query, operation_type, result_type, param_mapping, rollback_on_error, is_active) VALUES (#{interfaceId}, #{datasourceId}, #{query}, #{operationType}, #{resultType}, #{paramMapping}, #{rollbackOnError}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE eai_db_adapter_config SET interface_id = #{interfaceId}, datasource_id = #{datasourceId}, query = #{query}, operation_type = #{operationType}, result_type = #{resultType}, param_mapping = #{paramMapping}, rollback_on_error = #{rollbackOnError}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
